items.title: Relay lazy-load + idle eviction + abuse caps
items.description: Load rooms on connect, evict idle ones (self-healing via checkpoints), per-IP rate limits and blob/room caps — the #1 cost lever and a launch gate.
items.impact_rationale: Launch gate: without abuse caps and bounded RAM the relay cannot survive anything going viral.
items.effort_rationale: Relay-internal changes building on existing checkpoint machinery; ~1.5 weeks.
items.outcome: Shipped in commit 42f0a2b: lazy-load on connect, idle eviction with self-healing checkpoints, per-IP and per-room abuse caps.

items.title: In-app 'speak it into existence' AI generation
items.description: Stateless AI generation proxy (platform key, no DB): type a sentence, schema appears live, create, share — replaces copy-paste-to-ChatGPT as the front door.
items.impact_rationale: Launch gate: the front-door experience that makes Rooms self-explanatory to new users.
items.effort_rationale: New genproxy service plus in-app UI and fallback paths; ~2 weeks.
items.outcome: Shipped in commit 42f0a2b: stateless genproxy (Anthropic SDK / OpenAI-compatible / subscription sidecar) plus in-app Describe-it UI with spell counter and copy-paste fallback.
